umd_context.note: Campus empties — reduce staffing 40%, monitor costs

pricing_alerts.signal: $6 footlong sub promo through month end — aggressively underpricing
pricing_alerts.recommended_action: Marathon's differentiation is quality/variety — no need to match
pricing_alerts.financial_note: Subway targets different segment, low overlap risk

pricing_alerts.signal: burrito bowl dropped to $10.95 — $2.55 below Marathon gyro wrap
pricing_alerts.recommended_action: Hold gyro at $13.50 — emphasize portion size and local brand

temporal_alerts.window: Lunch rush window — monitor queue depth
temporal_alerts.recommended_action: Add one cook to Thursday 10PM-2AM shift

market_events: Sysco delivery driver shortage in MD — pita lead time up 2 days
Cooking oil futures up 4% this week on crop report
Maryland minimum wage increase to $15.50 effective July 1

replies.author: TerpFan2024
replies.text: Best late-night spot near UMD. The gyro is massive and the staff is super fast after midnight.

replies.author: UMD_Alumni_Fan
replies.text: Been going here since 2019. Aarav is still there and still the fastest checkout on campus.

replies.author: LateNightRegular
replies.text: Open until 3 AM and quality stays consistent. Michael keeps the night crew sharp.

replies.author: CollegeParkLocal
replies.text: Love this place but Thursday nights around 11 PM there's always a huge wait. Need more staff then.
